name: cubbit-mcp
description: Back up files to Cubbit DS3 (and any rclone-supported storage) — right from Claude.
long_description: cubbit-mcp is a Model Context Protocol server that wraps rclone to give Claude full backup capabilities: configure Cubbit DS3 credentials, run on-demand backups, schedule recurring jobs, and restore files — all through natural conversation.

tools.name: cubbit_setup
tools.description: Configure Cubbit credentials and verify connection

tools.name: cubbit_setup_status
tools.description: Check rclone installation and Cubbit config

tools.name: backup_path
tools.description: Back up a path to Cubbit or any rclone remote

tools.name: preview_restore
tools.description: Preview files in a backup before restoring

tools.name: restore_backup
tools.description: Restore a backup to a local path

tools.name: schedule_backup
tools.description: Schedule a recurring backup with a cron expression
